Prerequisite: GREK112; or permission of instructor.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 245

GREK212 Intermediate Modern Greek II (3 Credits)

A continuation in the development of fluency in spoken and written communication along with the exploration of syntactic and grammatical structures. Comprehension and vocabulary enrichment are further developed through selected readings from Modern Greek prose

and poetry. This is the second of our two-semester sequence in Intermediate Modern Greek and contributes to the fulfillment of the Global Engagement requirement of the College of Arts and Humanities. Prerequisite: GREK211; or permission of instructor.
